topics.title: Signals Won 2026 - Except in React. What Fine-Grained Reactivity Actually Means
topics.whyTrending: TC39 Signals proposal, Svelte 5 runes, SolidJS, Angular 20 and Vue 4 all converging on fine-grained reactivity while React deliberately stays out. Controversial, practical, not yet covered on the blog.
